    A

    addListenerToTarget(String, IConfigEventListener) - Static method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.CoreConfigParser
    Adds a configuration event listener to a specific parser target.
    ALLOW_LABELS - Static variable in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.CoreConfig
    Whether label references are allowed in instructions.
    AND - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions.nodes.ConditionToken.Type
     
    AndCondition - Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions
    Condition that evaluates to true only if all contained conditions evaluate to true.
    AndCondition(ICondition...) - Constructor for class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions.AndCondition
    Constructs an AndCondition from a variable number of conditions.
    AndCondition(List) - Constructor for class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions.AndCondition
    Constructs an AndCondition from a list of conditions.
    AndNode - Record Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions.nodes
     
    AndNode(ConditionNode, ConditionNode) - Constructor for record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions.nodes.AndNode
    Creates an instance of a AndNode record class.
